heading: Procedure for prescribing regulations
label: 31317 Procedure for prescribing regulations
text: Regulations prescribed by the Secretary of Transportation to carry out this chapter (except section 31307) shall be prescribed under without regard to sections 556 and 557 of title 5.section 553 of title 5
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3131749 App.:2715., , .Oct. 27, 1986Pub. L. 99–570, § 12018100 Stat. 3207–187The text of 49 App.:2715(a) is omitted as surplus because of 49:322(a). The words “(except section 31307)” are added because the source provisions restated in this section do not apply to the source provisions restated in section 31307 of the revised title.
